agent.name: CopyMagic AI
agent.description: AI copywriter for email campaigns, landing pages, and ad copy. Maintains brand voice across channels.

keyFindings: All 5 subject lines are under 60 characters.
All CAN-SPAM requirements met: clear sender identity, physical mailing address, unsubscribe link, honest subject line (matches content), and explanation of why recipient is receiving the email.
Three distinct angles: social proof, pain point, and outcome/benefit.
Both translations are grammatically correct but are near-literal translations, not market adaptations.

trustExplanation: Strong performance across 3 of 5 skills with pass safety.

recommendation.summary: Safe to use for ai copywriter for email campaigns, landing pages, and ad copy. maintains brand voice across channels..

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
